description: Correctly configured public endpoint. HTTPS and logging are enabled.
business_context: Public supplier portal used by manufacturing partners to access approved production documents and updates.

description: Public endpoint uses HTTPS, but logging is disabled. The endpoint is protected in transit, but activity monitoring is incomplete.
business_context: Public API used by manufacturing suppliers to submit delivery and production update data.

description: Dangerous public endpoint misconfiguration. HTTPS is disabled and logging is disabled.
business_context: Public customer-facing portal connected to manufacturing order and production status information.
